name: Dark Horse Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Dark Horse Technology Group Co., Ltd. operates business innovation and entrepreneurship service platform. Its programs include classes from universities, star startup forums, visits to incubators, startups, technology firms, and social events. The company also facilitates Chinese investments in startups and venture capital firms in Israel and in the United States; and brings international startups into China with funding via its VC and crowdfunding platforms. In addition, it provides a talent pool, where customers find business partners comprising investors, entrepreneurs, tech geeks, and professionals; and host events for investors and entrepreneurs. The company was formerly known as Dark Horse Venture (Beijing) Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Dark Horse Technology Group Co., Ltd. in June 2019. Dark Horse Technology Group Co., Ltd. is based in Beijing, China.
